title: Remove project name field from Settings UI init form
implementation_notes: In settings/index.vue, find the init inline form that shows Workspace name + Project name.
Remove the Project name input and its bound ref entirely.
The form should show only: Workspace name input + Initialise button.
Update the POST /api/vault/init call to omit projectName from the body.
Update the helper text below the form: remove any mention of project or board being created.
New helper text suggestion: 'RelayHQ will scaffold vault/shared and switch this machine to the new workspace immediately. You can add projects from the Projects page after init.'
acceptance_criteria: Init form in Settings page shows exactly one input: Workspace name.
Submitting the form calls POST /api/vault/init with { vaultRoot, workspaceName } only.
After successful init, Settings page shows green vault status.
Helper text accurately describes what init does and where to add projects.
completion_summary: Removed the project name field from the Settings init form, updated the helper text, and ensured the form posts only vaultRoot and workspaceName.
